titleStmt.title: SII 9.673: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 673. (A.R. No. 385 of 1927.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE RIGHT SIDE OF THE ENTRANCE INTO THE KOTESVARA TEMPLE AT KOTESVAR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1484, Dundubhi, Chaitra, śu. 10, corresponding to A.D. 1562 March 15, Sunday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivarāya-Mahārāya ruling at Vijayanagarī. It records that, when Sadāśivarāya-Nāyaka was governing the Tuḷu-rājya under the king's orders and Kalleya-Yellappa-Voḍeya was ruling over Bārakūru under the latter's command, Chituseṭṭi, son of Gaṇapaseṭṭi of Basarūru, caused the construction of a maṭha and granted land for the service of the god Umāmahēśvara in the maṭha, for feeding 6 persons daily and for the service of the god Kōṭēśvara, in whose presence the gift was made.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi (.) caṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1484
saṁdu saluva duṁdubhisaṁvatsarada caitra śu 10 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvī
rapratāpa śrīsadāsivarāyamahārāyaru vijayanagariyalu sthirarājyaṁgeyivā
ga Avara nirūpadiṁda sadāśivarāyanāyakaru tuḷurājyavanu māḍikoṁḍu bā
rakūra siṁhāsanadalu kalleya yelappavoḍeyarū rājyavanu pratipālisuva
kāladalu śrīkōṭīśvaradēvara sa(ṁ)nnidhiyalu basarūra paḍuvakēriya ga
ṇapaseṭṭiyara maga holeya baḷiya cituseṭṭiyū śivarātripu
ṇyakāladalu māḍida dharmaśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare kaṭṭisida maṭhada ca
tusīme vivara Akasāleya maṭhada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu maleyāḷa
voḍeyara maṭhada gaḍiyaṁ baḍagalu dēvālyada madiliṁdaṁ mūḍa
lu mūḍa[upparige(ṁ)sarita]diṁda taṁkalu �yo catusīmeyoḷage kaṭida
maṭhada Umāmahēśvaradēvara naivēdyakke Akki mu . 10 naṁdādīvige 1 ke E
mu 4 . nityachatra dina 1 kke jana 6 kke mu . 1 maṭhada pādukege kasava guḍi
sidakke mu 1 kōṭīśvaradēvara rudrābhiśēkakke mu 9 Aṁtu mu 881 śivarā
triya raṁgapūjege ga 3 ¥ 2 yiṁtiṣṭakke biṭa bāḷu haṁgara Adhivāsada
lu viṣṇu Āsaraṇara makkaḷu �yośvara Avara taṁma viṣṇuĀsaraṇana kai
yya mūlava koṁḍa bāḷu maneyiṁda mūḍa bayalalu mu 4 ... taṁka
bayalalu mu 2 ... 5 Ubhaya mu 7 . 5 teṁka mane baḍaga haṭi Aṁga
ḷa kaḷa yi(ṁ)ṣṭakke kōṭīśvaradēvara teru dēvasava tettu naḍava Akki mu 12
biḍāvāra bāḷu viṣṇuĀsaraṇana maga nārāyaṇāsaraṇana
bāḷu mu 10 ke Ardhaga 86 ge naḍasuva Akki mu 6 kēśavāsaraṇana ma
ga nārāyaṇaĀsaraṇana bage gade mu 5 ke Ardhaga 50 naḍuva A
kki mu 6 rāyadāsaraṁṇana maga kuṣṇamāsaraṇana bage bāḷu
gade mu 5 . 5 ge Ardhaga 125 ge naḍasuva Akki mu 6 Aṁtu bage 3 kke
naḍusuva Akki mu 18 dhanyara mukhāṁtaradalu koṭudu ga 310
ga haṁdigulliya bāḷu neraṁ baḷiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuva
lu Āsaraṇakaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu kōṭadhivāsada gaḍi
yiṁdaṁ teṁkalu dhanyaru nāraṇasabhāyatana kaiyya mūlava
koṁḍu bāḷu mu 11 jīkkana bage mu 3 . śaṁkarabhaṭṭara bage ba
ḍākareyalu maneya vinaha mu 5 ... yere bayalalu chā
gaṇiya maneya paḍuvalu dāri Aṁciṁdaṁ mū
ḍalu paḍuvalu saha mu 2 ... Aṁtu haṁgaḍe baḍākareyiṁ
da gaddemu 23 kkenaḍasuva Akki mu 31 mattaṁ dhanyara kaiyya
mūlava koṁḍa bāḷu saṁkarahorajati maṇi hoṁ
ciya bage maneya muṁde voḷabayalu cibāḍiya
bayalu hiṁdeyabayalu saha mu 81 ga teru kaḷadu naḍa
va Akki mu 9 baḍākare nāraṇadhanyana bage vōṇiyiṁda
mūḍalu dhanyara gaḍi teṁkalu rājara gaḍi paḍuvalu mū
ḍaṇa dhanyara gaḍi tera kartara gaḍi paḍuvaThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 9.673 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
